curriculum_context.concept: unique short-code generation with base62/hash-based encodings and explicit collision handling
curriculum_context.mechanic: Slug Launcher (3D hash cannon + base62 docks)
curriculum_context.accepted_signal: all crates docked to unique base62 codes; every collision detected and retried within the 5-attempt budget
curriculum_context.rejected_trap: losing a crate to retry-exhaustion instead of switching strategy, or treating a collision-free seed as proof of correctness
